model_note: Model output is being re-trained (pm25_conc target). Forecast values are not yet published - the map and location tools work, but per-cell values show 'awaiting model output'.
disclaimers: Research demonstrator for Jakarta MORNING air quality (pre-dawn anchor + commute hours); the afternoon peak is out of scope by design.
Forecasts are per H3 hex cell on the mainland-DKI grid, in 3-hour steps (now, +3h, +6h).

Ground truth is only 5 DKI monitoring stations, so OFF-station (per-cell) accuracy is NOT independently validatable - per-cell differences are an informed display gradient, not a measured value. A real deployment must state this.
